dsl_rule.translation_notes: White candle pattern expressed using bar properties: open < close (bullish), upper_wick and lower_wick both shorter than body (short shadows), body_pct >= 0.4 indicates normal body length relative to total range. Exit condition uses reversal (close < open) as original source was silent on exits. Exit stop_loss set to 2% as default prudent risk management.

backtest_rule.reason: White candle pattern expressed using bar properties: open < close (bullish), upper_wick and lower_wick both shorter than body (short shadows), body_pct >= 0.4 indicates normal body length relative to total range. Exit condition uses reversal (close < open) as original source was silent on exits. Exit stop_loss set to 2% as default prudent risk management.

source_rule_text: White Candle: A bullish sentiment candlestick pattern where price opens below where it closes, with shorter shadows relative to body length and normal body length
